description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 5 times to a random enemy and inflicts [Electrocute -> Shock]. Enemies [afflicted with Electrocute -> in Shock] are stunned for [2sec -> 1.8 sec].
For 6 sec, restores HP every [6sec -> 1 sec]. You cannot take other actions while the skill is active, but all allies' Magic Damage taken is reduced by [60% -> 25%].
For 7 sec, increases all allies' Attack, Attack Speed by 42%, and [Critical Rate by 150 -> Critical Hit Chance by 420].

Deals Magic Damage to 4 enemies, then inflicts [Electrocute -> Shock] for 20 sec. On a critical hit, stuns them for 0.6 sec. For each enemy in [Electrocute -> Shock], damage taken by you is reduced by 15%, up to 3 stacks. [Electrocute -> Shock]: For 20 sec, deals continuous Magic Damage equal to 25% of Attack Power every 1 sec.

dark.unified: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by [10% -> 30%].
If the number of enemies is [{1} -> {1}] or fewer, removes the target's beneficial effects.
When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by [200% -> {2}%] and their Mana by [100 -> {3}] per sec for [5 -> {1}] sec. This effect can only trigger once every [5 -> {4}] sec.

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a [30% -> {0}%] chance to deal Magic Damage equal to [{1}% -> {1}%] of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by [{1}% -> {2}%] for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for [0.5 sec -> 2 sec].
